# Test 1
FUNC: addition_function
A: 0000001111111111
B: 0000000000000001
EXPECTED: 0000010000000000

# Test 2
FUNC: addition_function
A: 0011110000000001
B: 0001000000000000
EXPECTED: 0011110000000001

# Test 3
FUNC: multiply_function
A: 0000001111111111
B: 0011100000000000
EXPECTED: 0000000111111111
